mapper.select: SELECT e.*, d.dept_name, c.class_name FROM sys_equipment e LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON e.class_id = c.class_id ORDER BY e.equipment_id ASC
SELECT e.*, d.dept_name, c.class_name FROM sys_equipment e LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON e.class_id = c.class_id WHERE e.equipment_id = #{equipmentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_equipment (equipment_no, equipment_name, dept_id, class_id, status, remark) VALUES (#{equipmentNo}, #{equipmentName}, #{deptId}, #{classId}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_equipment SET status=#{status}, remark=#{remark} WHERE equipment_id=#{equipmentId}
mapper.select:
SELECT e.*, d.dept_name, c.class_name FROM sys_equipment e LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_class c ON e.class_id = c.class_id
AND (e.equipment_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.equipment_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND e.status = #{status}
ORDER BY e.equipment_id ASC
